Test Dataset.entity_description: A test dataset is a separate portion of data used to evaluate the performance of a trained model. It helps in assessing how well the model generalizes to unseen data.

learning rate.entity_description: The learning rate is a hyperparameter that controls how much to change the model in response to the estimated error each time the model weights are updated during training.

fine-tuning epochs.entity_description: Fine-tuning epochs refer to the number of complete passes through the training dataset during the fine-tuning phase of a model, allowing it to adapt to specific tasks.
